description:
You are helping a developer clean-up and reorganize some loose project assets that are currently sitting in the downloads area.

GOAL  
Create a well-structured project tree called  “alpha_app” under /home/user/dev and then migrate the files that are in /home/user/downloads/alpha_assets into their proper places.  
After every move, you must record the operation in a CSV-formatted log so that an automated grading script can later verify that every file went exactly where it belongs.

STARTING MATERIAL  
1.  Directory:  /home/user/downloads/alpha_assets/  
    It already exists and contains exactly the eight files shown here (no other regular files or sub-directories are present):  
        • app.py  
        • helpers.py  
        • test_app.py  
        • test_helpers.py  
        • overview.md  
        • CHANGELOG.md  
        • Dockerfile  
        • LICENSE  

TARGET STRUCTURE (all paths are absolute)  
A new directory tree must end up looking like this:

/home/user/dev/alpha_app/                       ← main project directory
│
├── 1_src/                                      ← source code
│       app.py
│       helpers.py
│
├── 2_tests/                                    ← automated tests
│       test_app.py
│       test_helpers.py
│
├── 3_docs/                                     ← general documentation
│       overview.md
│
├── 4_build/                                    ← build-related artefacts
│       CHANGELOG.md
│       Dockerfile
│
├── LICENSE                                     ← (stays at project root)
│
├── organization.log                            ← CSV log file (see below)
└── summary_statistics.txt                      ← human-readable summary (see below)

MIGRATION RULES  
• All “regular” *.py modules that do NOT start with “test_” → 1_src/  
• Any Python file whose basename starts with “test_” → 2_tests/  
• All *.md files EXCEPT “CHANGELOG.md” → 3_docs/  
• “CHANGELOG.md” and “Dockerfile” → 4_build/  
• “LICENSE” must remain directly in the project root (do NOT move it into a numbered sub-directory).  

After the moves are finished the original directory /home/user/downloads/alpha_assets/ must be empty (you may delete it entirely or leave it empty).  

LOG REQUIREMENTS  
Create /home/user/dev/alpha_app/organization.log  
The file must be plain text, UTF-8, **comma-separated values with NO spaces**.  
The very first line is a header that must read exactly:  

    original_path,new_path,action,timestamp  

For every file that you physically moved (i.e., every file except LICENSE), append one data line.  
Field order:  
1. original_path – absolute path before the move  
2. new_path      – absolute path after the move  
3. action        – always the literal word “moved” (lower-case)  
4. timestamp     – always the literal string “STATIC” (all caps, without quotes)  

The seven data lines must appear in **alphabetical order by the basename of the moved file** (Dockerfile comes before app.py, etc.).  
Example (the paths here are just an illustration of the required CSV shape):

    original_path,new_path,action,timestamp
    /old/path/Dockerfile,/new/path/Dockerfile,moved,STATIC
    ...

SUMMARY FILE  
Create /home/user/dev/alpha_app/summary_statistics.txt   (plain UTF-8 text).  
It must contain exactly five newline-terminated lines, spelled and capitalised exactly like this:

    Total files moved: 7
    Src files: 2
    Test files: 2
    Docs files: 1
    Build files: 2

VERIFICATION HINTS  
• The automated tests will first check that the directory tree and file placements match the TARGET STRUCTURE.  
• They will then read organization.log and validate: correct header, seven lines, alphabetical order by filename, correct literal “STATIC” timestamps, and that original_path/new_path values reflect the real move operations that occurred.  
• Finally, they will read summary_statistics.txt to ensure the five lines contain the exact numbers shown above.

Remember: do not hard-code any shell commands in this response; the agent will figure those out.
truth:
Initial state that will be present **before the agent starts**:

        1. Directory  /home/user/downloads/alpha_assets/  exists and has regular files:
             app.py
             helpers.py
             test_app.py
             test_helpers.py
             overview.md
             CHANGELOG.md
             Dockerfile
             LICENSE

        2. Directory  /home/user/dev/  already exists and is writable by the agent but
           currently does NOT contain a sub-directory named alpha_app.

        Expected end state (used by automated grader):

        ── Directory /home/user/dev/alpha_app/ exists.
           • Sub-directories present:
                 1_src
                 2_tests
                 3_docs
                 4_build
           • Each listed directory truly exists on disk as a directory (not a link or file).

        ── File placements:
             /home/user/dev/alpha_app/1_src/app.py
             /home/user/dev/alpha_app/1_src/helpers.py
             /home/user/dev/alpha_app/2_tests/test_app.py
             /home/user/dev/alpha_app/2_tests/test_helpers.py
             /home/user/dev/alpha_app/3_docs/overview.md
             /home/user/dev/alpha_app/4_build/CHANGELOG.md
             /home/user/dev/alpha_app/4_build/Dockerfile
             /home/user/dev/alpha_app/LICENSE              (copied or moved but must end up here)

        ── /home/user/downloads/alpha_assets/  is either removed or exists but is completely empty
           (no regular files).

        ── organization.log must exist at:
             /home/user/dev/alpha_app/organization.log

           Expected content (exactly, including final newline at end of file):

original_path,new_path,action,timestamp
/home/user/downloads/alpha_assets/CHANGELOG.md,/home/user/dev/alpha_app/4_build/CHANGELOG.md,moved,STATIC
/home/user/downloads/alpha_assets/Dockerfile,/home/user/dev/alpha_app/4_build/Dockerfile,moved,STATIC
/home/user/downloads/alpha_assets/app.py,/home/user/dev/alpha_app/1_src/app.py,moved,STATIC
/home/user/downloads/alpha_assets/helpers.py,/home/user/dev/alpha_app/1_src/helpers.py,moved,STATIC
/home/user/downloads/alpha_assets/overview.md,/home/user/dev/alpha_app/3_docs/overview.md,moved,STATIC
/home/user/downloads/alpha_assets/test_app.py,/home/user/dev/alpha_app/2_tests/test_app.py,moved,STATIC
/home/user/downloads/alpha_assets/test_helpers.py,/home/user/dev/alpha_app/2_tests/test_helpers.py,moved,STATIC

           (Note: file order is alphabetical by filename; final newline after last line required.)

        ── summary_statistics.txt must exist at:
             /home/user/dev/alpha_app/summary_statistics.txt

           Expected content (each line terminated with '\n'):

Total files moved: 7
Src files: 2
Test files: 2
Docs files: 1
Build files: 2

        File permissions:
           • All newly created directories:  755  (agent default umask is fine)
           • All newly created files:        644  (default)
